get.description: Returns basic runtime information about the running server.
Streams 10 text chunks using chunked transfer encoding. For development/testing only.

200.description: A series of newline-delimited text chunks streamed to the client.

get.description: Streams package.json as a downloadable file. For development/testing only.

200.description: Returns package.json as a file attachment.

post.description: Accepts an image file upload and stores it. For development/testing only.

get.description: Returns authenticated user profile data from the access token context.

post.description: Creates a pending registration and sends OTP to the email. Frontend should call /register/verify after receiving OTP.
Verifies OTP and creates the account. Frontend should store returned authorization tokens after success.

400.description: Invalid or expired OTP, or registration creation failed.

post.summary: Step 2: Verify OTP and complete registration

post.description: Authenticates user with email/password and returns access + refresh tokens.
Issues a new access token using an existing valid refresh token.
Revokes refresh token for current authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates profile fields for authenticated user. Avatar should be sent as multipart file.

post.description: Sends an OTP/token to email for password reset flow.
Verifies email using OTP/token sent to the user email.
Resends email verification OTP/token to the provided email.
Resets password using email + OTP/token + new password.
Changes password for currently authenticated user.

get.description: Starts Google OAuth redirect flow. Frontend should navigate browser to this URL, not call it via XHR.

200.description: Redirects to Google OAuth consent screen.

get.description: OAuth callback endpoint. Usually called by Google after consent, returns app auth payload.

200.description: Google login completed and auth payload returned.

get.description: Starts Apple OAuth redirect flow. Frontend should navigate browser to this URL, not call it via XHR.
OAuth callback endpoint. Usually called by Apple after consent, returns app auth payload.

200.description: Apple login completed and auth payload returned.

post.description: Accepts Google ID token from mobile client (Flutter/Android/iOS) and returns application auth payload.
Accepts Apple identity token from mobile client (Flutter/iOS) and returns application auth payload.

400.description: Missing or invalid Apple identity token.

get.description: Returns all notifications for the authenticated user in descending order.

patch.description: Marks all unread notifications of the authenticated user as read.

200.description: All notifications marked as read (or no unread notifications).

patch.description: Marks a specific notification as read for the authenticated user.

400.description: Notification not found or unauthorized access.

patch.description: Marks a specific notification as unread for the authenticated user.

400.description: Notification not found or unauthorized access.

delete.description: Deletes a specific notification belonging to the authenticated user.

400.description: Notification not found or unauthorized access.

post.description: Creates a contact/support request from public application users.

400.description: Validation failed for contact request payload.

get.description: Returns all FAQ items ordered by configured sort order.

question.example: How do I start a free trial?

answer.example: Go to the subscription page and click Start Trial to activate your trial plan.

get.description: Returns one FAQ item by its unique identifier.

question.example: How do I start a free trial?

answer.example: Go to the subscription page and click Start Trial to activate your trial plan.

post.description: Creates a single FAQ entry.

get.description: Returns all FAQ entries.

post.description: Creates new FAQs and updates existing FAQs in a single request.

get.description: Returns a single FAQ by its id.

patch.description: Updates an existing FAQ by id.

post.description: Creates a new contact submission from admin panel.

get.description: Returns contact submissions with optional search and status filtering.
Returns a single contact submission by id.

patch.description: Updates an existing contact submission by id.

delete.description: Deletes a contact submission by id.

post.description: Creates or updates website information and optionally uploads logo/favicon files.

get.description: Returns current website information settings.
Returns all payment transactions visible to authenticated admin user.
Returns one payment transaction by id.

delete.description: Deletes a payment transaction by id.

post.description: Creates a user from admin panel.

get.description: Returns users with optional search/type/approval filtering.

post.description: Approves a pending user by id.
Rejects a pending user by id.

get.description: Returns details of one user by id.

patch.description: Updates an existing user by id.

get.description: Returns notifications for the currently authenticated admin user.

delete.description: Deletes all notifications for current admin user.
Deletes a notification by id for current admin user.

post.description: Receives Stripe webhook events. This endpoint is called by Stripe servers and validates `stripe-signature` before processing.

parameters.name: stripe-signature
parameters.description: Stripe webhook signature header used for payload verification.

400.description: Invalid webhook payload or missing/invalid stripe signature.

post.description: Starts a trial subscription for the authenticated user using a plan ID.

400.description: Invalid plan ID or trial not allowed.

post.description: Creates a subscription product and price configuration (typically for admin/internal setup).
Adds/attaches a card to authenticated user payment profile using provider token.

400.description: Invalid card token or product reference.

get.description: Returns active/trial/cancelled status and relevant subscription metadata for authenticated user.
Returns all available subscription plans for purchase/trial.

post.description: Cancels subscription for the authenticated user. Cancellation timing depends on billing settings.

get.summary: Suggest users for chat and member picker

post.summary: Block a user for DM messaging

200.description: DM conversation created or existing conversation returned.

post.summary: Create or return a DM conversation

memberIds.description: Member ids as an array, a comma-separated string, or a JSON array string in multipart form-data.

get.summary: List group conversations for current user
Get unread count for a conversation

post.summary: Add members to a group conversation (admin only)

patch.summary: Set role for a group member (admin only)
Clear conversation history for current user only

get.summary: List messages in a conversation (cursor pagination)

post.description: Production flow: use this endpoint for media/file messages in a conversation. For pure realtime text-only messages, use websocket event "message:send" on namespace "/ws". This endpoint creates and stores the message in DB and now also emits realtime "message:new" to the conversation room.

media_Url.description: Optional pre-uploaded media URL. If media file is provided, uploaded file URL is used.

400.description: Invalid payload, invalid content JSON, missing required fields, or unsupported media type.

401.description: Unauthorized token or user not authenticated.

delete.summary: Delete a message for current user permissions scope

get.summary: List image/video/audio messages in a conversation
List file messages in a conversation

post.summary: Join active call in a conversation
End active call for a conversation
Issue LiveKit token for current user in conversation

The date of birth of the user

received.description: Indicates whether webhook was accepted and processed.
